title: Specify and audit tree work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Specify and audit tree work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and prepare audit information

pcs.text: Identify audit objectives, scope and focus
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify audit objectives, scope and focus?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify audit objectives, scope and focus.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify target operations and documentation?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-audit communications with client and relevant stakeholders.
